framework.name: Best-Effort Spend Aggregation with Latency Window
framework.description: Stripe's spending limit enforcement has a 30-second aggregation delay and operates on best-effort basis, creating an exploitable window where rapid sequential transactions could exceed limits. Additional tips/fees posted later can also breach limits retroactively.
framework.raw_quote: Spending aggregation is done on a best-effort basis. You might notice a delay of up to 30 seconds between spend occurrence and spend aggregation. Additional tips and fees can be posted at a later time, causing a spending limit to be exceeded.
